title: Austrian ex-intelligence officer found guilty of Russia spying charges
description: The spy scandal has revived fears that Austria remains a hotbed of Russian espionage activity.
content:
Former intelligence official Egisto Ott has been found guilty of spying for Russia, in what has been dubbed Austria's biggest spy trial in years.
A jury in Vienna found Ott, 63, guilty of having handed over information to Russian intelligence officer... [1956 chars]

title: London bus driver dies after assault on Battersea Bridge
description: Sergei Krajev, 64, was taken to hospital after he was found critically injured on Monday.
content:
A London bus driver has died after he was attacked on Battersea Bridge.
Sergei Krajev, 64, was taken to hospital by air ambulance after he was found critically injured on the south London crossing at about 00:30 BST on Monday.
The Metropolitan Police... [825 chars]

title: UK agrees £3.7bn trade deal with six Gulf states
description: The deal will remove an estimated £580m worth of tariffs from British exports, but rights groups are critical
content:
The UK has struck a trade deal with a group of six Gulf states which it says will be worth £3.7bn to the economy.
The government said the deal with Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and United Arab Emirates (UAE) would remove an estimated £... [2402 chars]

title: Guardiola leaves Manchester City as one of the game’s greats - and someone who knows its dark heart
description: While there is no denying the magnitude of his achievements, his legacy is also tied up in politics, propaganda and hard power

title: Conservatives name Michael Winstanley for Makerfield by-election
description: Former Wigan Mayor Michael Winstanley is named as the Conservative Party's candidate.
content:
The Conservative Party has named its candidate for next month's Makerfield by-election.
Former Mayor of Wigan Michael Winstanley will represent the Tories in the by-election being held in the Greater Manchester constituency on Thursday 18 June.
